evidence: Subscription offerings dominate revenue and are distributed through direct and partner channels.
Creative Cloud combines software tools and cloud services for content workflows.
Hosting, data-center and support activities are material subscription delivery costs.
The technology platform operates a two-sided marketplace for hosts and guests.
Trust, safety, support and unique inventory influence marketplace participation.
Service fees are earned when marketplace bookings are completed.
Membership warehouses combine low prices with a limited product selection and high inventory turnover.
Volume purchasing, cross-docking and reduced handling support low operating costs.
Membership fees and merchandise sales are distinct recurring revenue mechanisms.

nodes.label: High inventory turnover and member renewal

evidence: VisaNet provides authorization clearing and settlement for ecosystem participants.
Visa connects issuers, acquirers, merchants and account holders without extending consumer credit.
Service, data-processing and international transaction fees monetize network activity.
Revenue mechanisms include online stores third-party seller services subscriptions and AWS.
Fulfillment technology and cloud infrastructure serve distinct customer groups at scale.
The company operates retail marketplace logistics cloud and advertising mechanisms.
Marriott primarily manages franchises and licenses properties while owning or leasing very few hotels.
Hotel owners use Marriott brands systems reservations marketing and loyalty programs.
Franchise and management fees monetize third-party property activity.

nodes.label: Third-party owner execution and travel cycles

evidence: Paid memberships provide access to the streaming service.
Content acquisition and production are central resources and costs.
Product interfaces and recommendations support content discovery and engagement.
Tesla designs manufactures leases and sells electric vehicles and energy products.
Automotive and energy generation and storage are separate reportable segments.
Direct infrastructure manufacturing scale and supply availability shape the model.
Mobility and delivery offerings connect consumers with independent providers and merchants.
Matching dispatch pricing payments and marketplace data are central platform capabilities.
Service fees are recognized around completed mobility and delivery transactions.

nodes.label: Provider incentives insurance and network cost

evidence: Equipment operations manufacture and sell equipment parts and technology through dealer channels.
Financial services finance and lease equipment sold through the operating ecosystem.
Agricultural cycles manufacturing execution and credit exposure constrain the model.
